name: Linguini Tomato
recipeIngredient: 6 servings Linguini, cooked, rinsed in tap water, and set aside
24 Roma tomatoes, grilled or oven-roasted and sliced
6 Portobello mushrooms (or other large mushrooms), grilled or sauteed and sliced
recipeInstructions:
1. To make Tomato Sauce: In a heavy saucepan, mix 4 cups roasted tomatoes with garlic, salt, and pepper. Simmer over medium heat until reduced by one-third.
2. Just Before Serving: In a heavy skillet, bring the sauce to boil over medium heat. Add Linguini and toss well.
3. Blanch 6 of the basil leaves in a little boiling water.
4. Serve by dividing the Linguini among 6 pasta bowls. Alternate the Roma tomatoes and mushroom slices in a circle around it. Drain and place one leaf in the middle of each bowl. Garnish each with a fresh, unblanched basil leaf.
